title: habenaria leucophaea var. praeclara
intro: Habenaria leucophaea var. praeclara, also known as the yellow pimpernel orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of H. leucophaea var. praeclara include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of H. leucophaea var. praeclara are often used to make teas, decoctions, and powders that are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
